metadata.name: Shatrughna
metadata.primary_role: Prince of Ayodhya / Youngest brother of Rama / Twin of Lakshmana / Conqueror of enemies
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Ikshvaku Dynasty, Ayodhya, Twin of Lakshmana)
metadata.divine_origin: Avatar-amsha of Vishnu's Sudarshana Chakra — the divine discus personified

timelines.context_description: Shatrughna serves Bharata during the exile years, and later conquers the demon Lavanasura and founds the city of Mathura.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Fair golden complexion identical to his twin Lakshmana, strong and healthy from martial training
physical_appearance.height: Tall and powerfully built, slightly stockier than Lakshmana
physical_appearance.build: Powerfully muscular warrior build, thick arms and chest, built more for raw power than Lakshmana's speed
physical_appearance.facial_features: Strong handsome features similar to Lakshmana but with a calmer, steadier expression, determined but less volatile eyes, square powerful jaw, confident half-smile
physical_appearance.hair: Thick black hair in a warrior's topknot, well-groomed and practical
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Known for his physical strength — second only to Bhima in a later era, his battle stance is famously immovable

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Royal warrior garments — a mix of princely white-gold silk and practical leather battle gear, armored shoulder guards
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Gold and silver crown of a prince, sturdy gold armlets, practical warrior's chain necklace
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A massive long-handled mace (Gada), a heavy war bow, a battle-axe — prefers heavy weapons reflecting his strength

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Steady, calm, quietly confident, speaks less than his brothers but every word carries weight
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Deep tenor-baritone — steady and grounded, no emotional fluctuation, rock-solid
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Few but decisive words, speaks with quiet authority, loyal and dependable speech patterns, never boasts
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Calm determined loyalty, rock-steady composure, fierce in battle but serene in peace

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Cinematic portrait of Prince Shatrughna, age 25, warrior prince of Ayodhya. Fair golden complexion, strong stocky muscular build. Calm determined eyes, square powerful jaw, confident expression. Black hair in a warrior topknot. Wearing royal white-gold garments with leather battle armor, gold crown, sturdy armlets. Holding a massive golden mace. Standing before the walls of a grand city (Mathura). 3D Pixar style, strong heroic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A deep, steady male tenor-baritone voice. Calm, grounded, rock-solid composure. Few but decisive words. Age approximately 25 years.
